tasks.label: Deploy Latest To GitHub Pages
args: cd "/Users/tranquocviet/Documents/Web báo cáo demo" && git add -A . && git restore --staged server/telegram-bridge-state.json 2>/dev/null; if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo "No changes to deploy."; else git commit -m "chore: auto deploy $(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S)" && git push origin main; fi
